channel.title: Tech Library
channel.description: Free tech tutorials, tools, lexicon, and digital survival guides

item.title: 404 — Page Not Found — Tech Library
item.description: Page Not Found

item.title: Tech Library — Tutorials, Tools, Lexicon & Resources
item.description: Tutorials, tech lexicon, emergency survival resources, free media alternatives, and curated resources — all free, all organized.

item.title: Tablet Buyer's Guide — Tech Library
item.description: iPad, Android, or Windows — choose the right tablet for creativity, productivity, or entertainment.

item.title: Phone Buyer's Guide — Tech Library
item.description: From budget workhorses to flagship cameras — find the right phone for your needs and budget.

item.title: Laptop Buyer's Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Chromebook, Ultrabook, Gaming, or Workstation — find the right portable powerhouse for your workflow.

item.title: Desktop Buyer's Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Office, Gaming, Creator, or Server — choose your next desktop build with confidence.

item.title: Audio Buyer's Guide — Tech Library
item.description: IEMs, headphones, speakers, DACs, and amps — navigate the world of personal audio with confidence.

item.title: Accessories Buyer's Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, docks, and cables — the gear that completes your setup.

item.title: Regular Expressions Guide — Tech Library
item.description: A practical guide to regex — patterns, syntax, tools, and real-world examples.

item.title: jq Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Parse, filter, and transform JSON from the command line using jq — queries, pipes, arrays, and practical API data extraction.

item.title: Arch Linux Installation Guide — Tech Library
item.description: From bare metal to a fully functional Arch Linux system — a complete step-by-step walkthrough.

item.title: Personal Knowledge Management — Tech Library
item.description: Build a personal knowledge management system — note-taking methods, PARA, Zettelkasten, and knowledge base tools.

item.title: Digital Minimalism Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Reduce digital clutter and improve focus — declutter apps, manage notifications, optimize social media, and build deep work habits.

item.title: Accessible Design Patterns — Tech Library
item.description: Design accessible interfaces — forms, navigation, modals, color contrast, focus management, and inclusive design principles.

item.title: Screen Reader Testing & ARIA — Tech Library
item.description: Test websites with screen readers — NVDA, VoiceOver, JAWS — and implement ARIA roles, properties, and best practices.

item.title: WCAG Web Accessibility Standards — Tech Library
item.description: Understand WCAG accessibility standards — POUR principles, conformance levels, success criteria, and compliance testing.

item.title: Tech Freelancing Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Start and grow a tech freelancing business — rates, contracts, client acquisition, platforms, and financial management.

item.title: Technical Interview Preparation — Tech Library
item.description: Prepare for technical interviews — coding challenges, system design, behavioral questions, salary negotiation, and strategy.

item.title: Open Source Contribution Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Start contributing to open source — finding projects, PR workflow, community etiquette, and building your reputation.

item.title: GitHub Portfolio & Open Source — Tech Library
item.description: Build an impressive GitHub portfolio — profile README, project repositories, contribution graph, and personal branding.

item.title: Tech Resume Writing Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Write an effective tech resume — structure, keywords, achievements, ATS optimization, and industry-specific advice.

item.title: MQTT Protocol for IoT — Tech Library
item.description: Learn the MQTT protocol for IoT communication — publish/subscribe, brokers, Quality of Service levels, topics, and security.

item.title: IoT Sensor Projects — Tech Library
item.description: Build practical IoT sensor projects — temperature, humidity, motion, and distance sensors with data logging and visualization.

item.title: Home Assistant Smart Home — Tech Library
item.description: Set up Home Assistant for smart home automation — installation, integrations, automations, dashboards, and best practices.

item.title: ESP32 with MicroPython — Tech Library
item.description: Program ESP32 microcontrollers with MicroPython — WiFi, Bluetooth, sensor integration, deep sleep, and OTA updates.

item.title: Arduino Programming & Electronics — Tech Library
item.description: Program Arduino microcontrollers — digital/analog I/O, sensor interfacing, communication protocols, and real-world projects.

item.title: Procedural Content Generation — Tech Library
item.description: Generate game content procedurally — noise functions, dungeon generation, terrain algorithms, and PCG design patterns.

item.title: 2D Game Physics & Collision Detection — Tech Library
item.description: Implement 2D physics for games — rigid bodies, collision shapes, triggers, raycasting, and optimization techniques.

item.title: Game Loop & Architecture Patterns — Tech Library
item.description: Design robust game architecture — game loop patterns, ECS, state machines, component patterns, and code organization.

item.title: Unity Game Engine Introduction — Tech Library
item.description: Introduction to Unity game development — GameObjects, components, physics, C# scripting, and editor workflow.

item.title: Godot Engine Game Development — Tech Library
item.description: Get started with Godot Engine — the scene system, GDScript, 2D/3D rendering, signals, and node-based architecture.

item.title: Mobile App Store Deployment — Tech Library
item.description: End-to-end mobile app deployment — App Store Connect, Google Play Console, code signing, CI/CD pipelines, and release management.

item.title: SwiftUI for iOS Development — Tech Library
item.description: Learn SwiftUI for building declarative iOS interfaces — state management, data flow, navigation patterns, and best practices.

item.title: Android Studio Setup & Workflow — Tech Library
item.description: Set up Android Studio for productive Android development — emulator configuration, Gradle build system, debugging, and profiling.

item.title: Flutter Advanced Patterns — Tech Library
item.description: Deep dive into advanced Flutter development — state management strategies, custom animations, platform channels, and testing patterns.

item.title: React Native Mobile Development — Tech Library
item.description: Build cross-platform mobile apps with React Native — core components, navigation, native modules, and performance optimization.

item.title: macOS Troubleshooting & Recovery — Tech Library
item.description: Diagnose and fix common macOS problems using Disk Utility, Safe Mode, Recovery Mode, activity monitoring, and log analysis.

item.title: macOS Automation (Shortcuts, Automator & AppleScript) — Tech Library
item.description: Automate repetitive tasks on macOS using Shortcuts, Automator workflows, AppleScript, and shell scripting with launchd scheduling.

item.title: macOS Security & Privacy — Tech Library
item.description: Hardening macOS security with Gatekeeper, SIP, FileVault, firewall settings, and privacy controls to protect your data.

item.title: Homebrew & macOS CLI Tools — Tech Library
item.description: Master Homebrew for package management on macOS — formulae, casks, taps, and essential CLI tools every developer needs.

item.title: macOS for Linux & Windows Switchers — Tech Library
item.description: Everything you need to know when switching to macOS from Linux or Windows — Finder, Terminal, keyboard shortcuts, and key differences.

item.title: AI Ethics & Responsible Development — Tech Library
item.description: Understand the ethical dimensions of AI — bias mitigation, fairness metrics, transparency, privacy, regulation, and responsible development practices.

item.title: LLM Prompting & Integration — Tech Library
item.description: Learn prompt engineering, RAG architectures, function calling, and API integration for large language models in Python.

item.title: Computer Vision with OpenCV — Tech Library
item.description: Master computer vision with OpenCV — image processing, object detection, face recognition, video analysis, and deep learning integration.

item.title: Natural Language Processing with Python — Tech Library
item.description: Process and analyze text data with Python — spaCy, NLTK, text classification, word embeddings, transformers, and LLM integration.

item.title: ML Model Deployment — Tech Library
item.description: Deploy machine learning models to production — REST APIs, Docker containers, MLflow tracking, monitoring, and MLOps best practices.

item.title: Feature Engineering for ML — Tech Library
item.description: Transform raw data into powerful ML features — encoding, scaling, selection, creation, and automated engineering pipelines.

item.title: Jupyter Notebook Mastery — Tech Library
item.description: Maximize productivity with Jupyter Notebook — magic commands, extensions, kernels, version control, and sharing workflows.

item.title: Data Visualization with Matplotlib & Seaborn — Tech Library
item.description: Create publication-quality visualizations — Matplotlib fundamentals, Seaborn statistical plots, styling, and dashboard integration.

item.title: Pandas Data Analysis — Tech Library
item.description: Master Pandas for data manipulation — DataFrames, groupby operations, merging datasets, time series analysis, and performance optimization.
